testcase.name: should handle biblia sharing

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Unable to find an element with the text: Check out this cool verse on Biblia:. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. In this case, you can provide a function for your text matcher to make your matcher more flexible.

testcase.failure: TestingLibraryElementError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Unable to find an element with the text: Check out this cool verse on Biblia:. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. In this case, you can provide a function for your text matcher to make your matcher more flexible. at Object.getElementError (https://internal.faithlife.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\support\index.js:96559:17) at eval (https://internal.faithlife.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\support\index.js:97524:25) at eval (https://internal.faithlife.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\support\index.js:97496:24) at eval (https://internal.faithlife.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\support\index.js:97549:25) at baseCommandImpl (https://internal.faithlife.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\support\index.js:95917:16) at commandImpl (https://internal.faithlife.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\support\index.js:95920:40) at getValue (https://internal.faithlife.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\support\index.js:95944:23) at resolveValue (https://internal.faithlife.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\support\index.js:95984:35)

testcase.name: should be able to create and edit a post in a group
should be able to create a post from the main newsfeed
should be able to create a post with a URL and display opengraph data
should be able to mention another user in a post
should be able to flag a comment as inappropriate
should support creating and editing an article post
should be able to delete a comment
should be able to pin and un-pin a post
should be able to create and edit a prayer post
should be able to search for hashtags within comments
